category_sources: Official SSDB documentation describes SSDB as a fast NoSQL database supporting KV, list, map/hash, and zset data structures.
source_facts.description says NoSQL database supporting many data structures and Redis alternative.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub README use SSDB.
docs_sources: Official SSDB documentation site provides get-started, commands, administration, protocol, and API docs.
Official ideawu/ssdb README links to the documentation project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ideawu/ssdb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official SSDB docs list key-value, list, hashmap, and sorted-set support.
source_facts.description identifies SSDB as a NoSQL database and Redis alternative.
source_facts.executables include ssdb-server, ssdb-cli, ssdb-dump, and ssdb-bench.
